requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerators and Freezers (UL / NRTL)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用电冰箱及冷冻箱（UL / NRTL）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用電冰箱及冷凍箱（UL / NRTL）

summary.en: Household refrigerators and freezers sold in the United States must be certified to UL 60335-2-24 (Household and Similar Electrical Appliances — Safety — Particular Requirements for Refrigerating Appliances, Ice-Cream Appliances and Ice Makers), the harmonised IEC-based standard adopted by UL. Older products may carry UL 250 (Household Refrigerators and Freezers) certification; UL 250 remains valid but UL 60335-2-24 is the current primary standard. Certification must be issued by an OSHA-recognised Nationally Recognised Testing Laboratory (NRTL) such as UL, CSA, ETL (Intertek), MET, or TUV. The NRTL mark (e.g., UL Mark, ETL Mark, CSA Mark) is required before the product can be sold in US retail or commercial channels. Self-declaration is not accepted for electrical safety in the US for this product category.
summary.zh: 在美国销售的家用电冰箱及冷冻箱须通过UL 60335-2-24（家用和类似电器安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）认证，该标准为UL采用的基于IEC的协调标准。较早期产品可持有UL 250（家用冰箱和冷冻箱）认证；UL 250仍有效，但UL 60335-2-24为当前主要标准。认证须由OSHA认可的全国认可检测实验室（NRTL）颁发，如UL、CSA、ETL（Intertek）、MET或TUV。产品进入美国零售或商业渠道前须持有NRTL标志（如UL标志、ETL标志、CSA标志）。本产品类别在美国不接受自我声明的电气安全合规方式。
summary.zht: 在美國銷售的家用電冰箱及冷凍箱須通過UL 60335-2-24（家用和類似電器安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）認證，該標準為UL採用的基於IEC的協調標準。較早期產品可持有UL 250（家用冰箱和冷凍箱）認證；UL 250仍有效，但UL 60335-2-24為當前主要標準。認證須由OSHA認可的全國認可檢測實驗室（NRTL）頒發，如UL、CSA、ETL（Intertek）、MET或TUV。產品進入美國零售或商業渠道前須持有NRTL標誌（如UL標誌、ETL標誌、CSA標誌）。本產品類別在美國不接受自我聲明的電氣安全合規方式。

standards_or_laws: UL 60335-2-24 — Household and Similar Electrical Appliances — Safety — Particular Requirements for Refrigerating Appliances, Ice-Cream Appliances and Ice Makers
UL 250 — Household Refrigerators and Freezers (legacy, still valid)

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators are subject to GB 4706.13 (Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice makers) under the mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme, and GB 4706.1 (General requirements). CCC certification is issued by CNCA-designated bodies. Chinese CCC marks and test reports to GB 4706.13 are not accepted as substitutes for NRTL certification in the US market; separate NRTL testing to UL 60335-2-24 is required.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱须在强制性CCC（中国强制认证）体系下满足GB 4706.13（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求）及GB 4706.1（通用要求）。CCC认证由CNCA指定机构颁发。中国CCC标志及依据GB 4706.13出具的检测报告，不被美国市场接受作为NRTL认证的替代；须独立通过NRTL依据UL 60335-2-24进行检测。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱須在強制性CCC（中國強制認證）體系下滿足GB 4706.13（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求）及GB 4706.1（通用要求）。CCC認證由CNCA指定機構頒發。中國CCC標誌及依據GB 4706.13出具的檢測報告，不被美國市場接受作為NRTL認證的替代；須獨立通過NRTL依據UL 60335-2-24進行檢測。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2008 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice makers (CCC mandatory)
GB 4706.1-2005 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (CCC mandatory)

gap.en: There is no mutual recognition agreement between China CCC and US NRTL schemes. Exporters must engage a US OSHA-recognised NRTL to test and certify the product to UL 60335-2-24. Additional US-specific requirements include 120 V / 60 Hz electrical compatibility (Chinese products are typically rated 220 V / 50 Hz), NEMA 5-15 plug (US standard 3-pin), and English-language safety markings. Hardware adaptation (voltage, plug) is usually required alongside separate NRTL certification.
gap.zh: 中国CCC与美国NRTL体系之间无互认协议。出口商须委托美国OSHA认可的NRTL依据UL 60335-2-24对产品进行检测和认证。美国特定要求还包括120V/60Hz电气兼容性（中国产品通常额定220V/50Hz）、NEMA 5-15插头（美国标准三芯）及英文安全标识。通常需要在取得独立NRTL认证的同时进行硬件调整（电压、插头）。
gap.zht: 中國CCC與美國NRTL體系之間無互認協議。出口商須委託美國OSHA認可的NRTL依據UL 60335-2-24對產品進行檢測和認證。美國特定要求還包括120V/60Hz電氣相容性（中國產品通常額定220V/50Hz）、NEMA 5-15插頭（美國標準三芯）及英文安全標識。通常需要在取得獨立NRTL認證的同時進行硬體調整（電壓、插頭）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NRTL certification (UL 60335-2-24 or UL 250) required; no NRTL mark = no US retail/commercial sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification under GB 4706.13 required for domestic Chinese market

source.publisher: US Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NRTL certification to UL 60335-2-24 is effectively mandatory for US market entry. Chinese CCC / GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted. Voltage and plug adaptation from 220 V / 50 Hz to 120 V / 60 Hz with NEMA 5-15 plug is typically required. A separate NRTL engagement is needed before US sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】UL 60335-2-24 NRTL认证实际上是进入美国市场的强制要求。中国CCC / GB 4706.13认证不被接受。通常需要将电压和插头从220V/50Hz调整为120V/60Hz NEMA 5-15插头。在美国销售前须独立委托NRTL认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】UL 60335-2-24 NRTL認證實際上是進入美國市場的強制要求。中國CCC / GB 4706.13認證不被接受。通常需要將電壓和插頭從220V/50Hz調整為120V/60Hz NEMA 5-15插頭。在美國銷售前須獨立委託NRTL認證。
